interaction_phrase: Home to some of the greatest philosophers in the western canon like Socrates
occurrence_sentence: Greece (or the more expansive Hellenic world), the cradle of European civilization and a bastion of culture and enlightenment throughout the ages. Home to some of the greatest philosophers in the western canon like Socrates, Plato and Artistotle.

occurrence_sentence: According to [2018 data from AngelList published at Enterprise Greece](https://www.enterprisegreece.gov.gr/images/public/The-Greek-Startup-Scene_2018.pdf), a social network site for investors and startups, there were approximately 550 startups and over 2800 investors operating in the country.

interaction_phrase: the brainchild of ... Dimitris Badounas
occurrence_sentence: Founded in Patras, Achaia, the regional capital of western Greece in 2019, PiDust is the brainchild of innovative entrepreneurs Vasilis Armaos, Paraskevas Deligiannis and Dimitris Badounas.

interaction_phrase: published at Enterprise Greece
occurrence_sentence: According [2018 data from AngelList published at Enterprise Greece](https://www.enterprisegreece.gov.gr/images/public/The-Greek-Startup-Scene_2018.pdf), a social network site for investors and startups, there were approximately 550 startups and over 2800 investors operating in the country.

interaction_phrase: published on an Enterprise Greece white paper
occurrence_sentence: What is more interesting, maybe, is that data from OECD Science & technology statistics 2017, again published on an [Enterprise Greece white paper](https://www.enterprisegreece.gov.gr/images/public/pdf-files/imerologio/GBS_SSCs_New_v5_.pdf) from 2018, showed that the Greeks are European leaders in science and technology workforce as a share of the active population, coming in at 38.5%, beating the likes of Portugal and Italy in the process.

occurrence_sentence: Dimitris Badounas, the other supporting character in this Greek drama with skin in PiDust, is currently a computational scientist in the Department of Materials Science at the University of Patras.
